This Week in Science
 
Discoveries, breakthroughs, and everything in between. Issue #247 — March 2026.
 
New Species Found at Record Depth
Researchers catalog over 40 previously unknown species in the hadal zone, challenging our understanding of deep-sea ecosystems.
Quantum Error Correction Milestone
A team demonstrates sustained logical qubit operation with error rates below the threshold needed for practical computation.
